design_decisions.d0r_pending_approval: D0.R made 1 assumption + 1 definition change(s) PROVISIONALLY (pending approval, direction-of-truth align/correct/discharge): ass:denominator-margin, def:cumulant-admissible-family

added_assumptions.label: ass:denominator-margin
added_assumptions.statement: For the chosen admissible pair (m,C), det K_X(I_v,C) is nonzero at the true law; equivalently, |det K_X(I_v,C)| >= c0 for some constant c0 > 0.

proposed_from.topic: Constructive identification in linear non-Gaussian SEMs under general non-factor confounding: for a direct-effect coefficient certified generically identifiable by the non-intersecting-path v-rank criterion of Tramontano-Drton-Etesami 2024 -- whose proof only produces a rank witness in the UNOBSERVED mixing matrix B_Lambda and yields no observable-side formula -- derive the EXPLICIT closed-form identifying functional expressing the coefficient as a rational function of OBSERVABLE higher-order cross-cumulants, via a cumulant-transfer that uses cumulant multilinearity and the bidirected connected-set vanishing pattern to cancel the general confounding at the cumulant order the graph dictates; this is the higher-cumulant generalization of the covariance IV ratio, valid precisely where second moments and linear-factor LiNGAM / over-complete-ICA identities fail once the parent edge carries a bow, with a consistent plug-in sample-cumulant estimator and delta-method inference as a plug-in corollary.
proposed_from.novelty_justification: The chosen kernel is not a relabeling of TDE's graphical criterion, because its object is an explicit observable functional rather than a hidden B_Lambda witness or residual-independence optimization. It is not subsumed by KivvaSalehkaleybarKiyavash2023 or TramontanoKivvaSalehkaleybarDrtonKiyavash2025, because those papers derive cumulant formulas only on proxy or underspecified-IV lvLiNGAM graphs with linear latent-source structure, whereas the proposed theorem targets arbitrary TDE-certified edges under general bidirected confounding and bows. It is not subsumed by FoygelDraismaDrton2012 or BarberDrtonSturmaWeihs2022, because those formulas live on the covariance layer and do not solve the connected-set cumulant cancellation problem created by general non-factor confounding. The minimal-order question remains explicitly open inside the proposal rather than being silently assumed away.

seed_details.open_problem: derive an explicit observable rational functional for every TDE-certified direct edge
seed_details.one_line: For a TDE-certified edge u -> v, build an observable determinant ratio in higher-order cross-cumulants that equals lambda_uv.
seed_details.red_team: Immediate from TDE because B_Lambda minors already identify the edge and cumulants identify B_Lambda.
seed_details.rebuttal: TDE identifies through hidden B_Lambda ranks, while observable cumulants under arbitrary bidirected dependence mix connected error sets; the transfer from hidden minors to observable cumulants is exactly the missing theorem.

seed_details.open_problem: extend closed-form cumulant identification from one coefficient to a simultaneous parent-effect vector
seed_details.one_line: Construct an observable cumulant matrix K_X(I_v,C) whose solution returns the full parent-effect row lambda_pa(v),v, with lambda_uv as a Cramer-rule corollary.
seed_details.red_team: This is just the half-trek covariance system with cumulants swapped in.
seed_details.rebuttal: Half-trek formulas exploit second-moment trek cancellation under Gaussian-style latent projections; here the nontrivial step is connected-set cumulant cancellation under arbitrary non-factor confounding, which existing half-trek theory does not supply.

seed_details.open_problem: characterize the minimum cumulant order needed for a TDE-certified direct effect
seed_details.one_line: Define a graph invariant m_star and prove identification from cumulants up to m_star together with lower-order impossibility.
seed_details.red_team: The answer is probably just the size of the relevant bidirected district.
seed_details.rebuttal: District size alone does not control denominator nonvanishing or witness compatibility; the open content is the joint path-plus-connected-set frontier and a matching lower-order indistinguishability construction.

seed_details.open_problem: multiple TDE witnesses may exist for the same edge
seed_details.one_line: Show that all admissible observable cumulant witnesses induce the same rational functional for lambda_uv.
seed_details.red_team: Once the coefficient is identified, equality of two formulas is automatic and not a standalone contribution.
seed_details.drop_reason: After Step 1 it looked better as a proposition inside the main kernel than as an independent proposal.

seed_details.open_problem: classify the finite set, interval, or unbounded fiber when the v-rank criterion fails
seed_details.one_line: Project the cumulant moment map onto lambda_uv and determine when the fiber is finite, bounded, or unbounded.
seed_details.red_team: This is too broad and degenerates into generic algebraic-geometry language without a computable object.
seed_details.drop_reason: The literature check did not reveal a sharp, evaluable object beyond abstract fiber language, so novelty stayed too diffuse for a first cold-start angle.

seed_details.open_problem: extend explicit cumulant functionals to feedback cycles
seed_details.one_line: Replace the acyclic path expansion by an invertible-feedback cumulant transfer and derive a cyclic observable determinant formula.
seed_details.red_team: TDE already shows the acyclic criterion is not sufficient in cycles, so this asks for two new theorems at once.
seed_details.drop_reason: The cyclic case remained too unconstrained after the scan; it is a genuine future program, not a clean first kernel.

seed_details.open_problem: derive valid confidence sets near genericity failure for cumulant-ratio estimators
seed_details.one_line: After deriving the formula, obtain asymptotic normality away from zero denominators and a weak-denominator confidence-set theory near genericity failure.
seed_details.red_team: Away from zero this is only a routine delta-method corollary.
seed_details.rebuttal: The weak-denominator regime is not routine and is explicitly flagged as future work by TDE, but it still depends on first solving the constructive formula problem.

seed_details.open_problem: trade off cumulant order against variance once graph-dependent admissible orders are known
seed_details.one_line: Estimate lambda_uv using the smallest admissible order and compare its asymptotic variance to higher-order alternatives.
seed_details.red_team: Without a solved m_star theory this is a tuning-paper wrapper around the real problem.
seed_details.drop_reason: Step 1 confirmed that the estimable object depends on the unresolved constructive-order theorem, so this is a follow-on rather than a kernel.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: thm:cumulant-row-system / thm:closed-form-coefficient
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The determinant-ratio claims are conditional on a chosen admissible family C in Mcal_m; existence of such a family is not assumed for the finite-order-transfer question.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The closed-form coefficient is claimed only conditional on admissibility; the genuine novelty is the finite-order transfer and order-frontier questions.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: prop:plugin-delta-method
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Weak-denominator uniform coverage is explicitly outside scope and inference is pointwise away from det K_X = 0.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: The inference claim is limited to fixed admissible C under finite 2m moments and |det K_X(I_v,C)| >= c0.

banked_reason: Math sound; the conditional cumulant-transfer determinant-ratio kernel is a valid observable identifying functional on the TDE frontier GIVEN an admissible family, but it does not clear the FIELD floor: no nonempty higher-order (beyond covariance/IV/half-trek) admissible class is proved, and codex showed the natural bowed-edge order-3 construction is BLOCKED (bow contamination is monotone under connected augmentation), so the only unconditional result is the order-2 source-isolated subclass which lands in the known IV/half-trek layer.
